name: 贾马尔·劳埃德·约翰逊
name_full: 贾马尔·劳埃德·约翰逊 Jamal Lloyd Johnson
introduction: Standing at an impressive 6'4, Jamal Lloyd Johnson's presence captivates any audience. A former athlete, Jamal spent many years as a business man before transitioning back into his childhood passion of acting. Jamal studied theatre at the prestigious American Academy of Dramatic Arts in New York and has since worked on stage and screen luring both domestic and international audiences of all ages in with his athletic build, powerful glare and boyish dimpled smile.
